title: 2026-03-17 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 34.96
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-03-17: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 34.96/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2026-03-17, the score printed 34.96/100 in the elevated regime, with inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
